messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: Express, Port: 2552, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: Create a minimal hello world app where i can change colors of the text. frontend + backend. 
Clarifications:
- framework: Express
- port: 2552
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: Express, Port: 2552, Styling: Tailwind CSS; Request: Create a minimal hello world app where i can change colors of the text. frontend + backend.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "repo-init",
      "title": "Initialize project repository",
      "description": "Create project folder, run npm init -y, and create basic file structure (src/, public/, package.json).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Project folder exists with package.json and directories src/ and public/ created."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-dependencies",
      "title": "Install Node.js dependencies",
      "description": "Install Express and development tools plus Tailwind requirements (express, nodemon optional, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "repo-init"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "node_modules present and package.json scripts updated (e.g., dev and build scripts)."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind CSS",
      "description": "Initialize tailwind.config.js and PostCSS, add input/output CSS files and a build script to produce public/styles.css.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-dependencies"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "tailwind.config.js and postcss config present and running build produces public/styles.css with Tailwind utilities."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-backend-server",
      "title": "Implement Express backend",
      "description": "Create an Express server in src/server.js listening on port 2552, serve static files from public/, and add a simple JSON API to get/set current text color (in-memory storage).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-dependencies"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Express server starts on port 2552, public/ served, and API endpoints /api/color (GET/POST) respond with JSON and reflect in-memory color."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-frontend",
      "title": "Build minimal frontend with Tailwind",
      "description": "Create public/index.html and public/main.js that import public/styles.css, display 'Hello World' text, and provide UI (color picker or buttons) to change text color by calling the backend API.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "index.html loads Tailwind CSS, shows Hello World text, and frontend UI sends/receives color via /api/color to update displayed text color."
    },
    {
      "id": "integrate-and-test",
      "title": "Integrate frontend and backend; run tests",
      "description": "Start the server, build Tailwind, access the page at http://localhost:2552, verify color changes persist while server runs and API calls succeed; fix any integration issues.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-backend-server",
        "create-frontend"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Opening http://localhost:2552 shows the app; changing color updates the text immediately and GET /api/color returns the current color."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down split by setup, dependency installation, styling configuration, backend implementation, frontend implementation, and final integration/testing to ensure clear sequential dependencies."
}
